title: Platinum
description: Adds platinum to the game(and copper tools/armor)
body:
Dieser Mod funktioniert mit Deutsch

I recommend adding JEI/EMI/REI


This mod adds platinum as a resource for building, and as a gear set that's values are between diamond and netherite(while being slightly cheaper than both)


and also copper armor/tools(compatible with create legacy copper)



original idea is from my (not very good) resource pack(which you can enable the textures from in-game)
